query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "dockerless: environment-free program verifier for coding agents" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly addresses the core mechanism of "agentic program verification" and the specific domain of "coding agents" mentioned in the user's question, focusing on the same bottleneck (automated proof generation) and utilizing LLM agents to solve it, even though it targets a specific sub-problem (lemma discovery) rather than the "Dockerless" environment aspect.
